label: CU loop • recognise an impossible goal and stop
query: Export the entire conversation history to a PDF file.
notes: There is no control that can do this — the app only has a message box and a Send button. A disciplined model recognises the goal is unreachable and calls give_up; a weaker one flails until the step cap. Passing requires gaveUp/deadEnd (recognised it), so a stepCapReached run FAILS as flailing.
